title: Add columns other than address on Map view
excerpt: I wish there was a way to add other columns on the map view when clicking on the pinned addresses. I know we can click on view item and can see the details but if would be helpful if we can just click the pin and see det…

posts.author: apantoja (Archie Pantoja)
posts.cookedHtml: I wish there was a way to add other columns on the map view when clicking on the pinned addresses. I know we can click on view item and can see the details but if would be helpful if we can just click the pin and see details we prefer to see. Kind of like the card view but when you click the pin on the map.

posts.author: kirsty_redgate (Kirsty Roper)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like this feature too. I created a shareable link for our sales team which shows all of our Marketing events. They just need to see location, title and date, but in the shareable link view you cannot expand the item to see details like ‘date’ so it isn’t useful to us. I am told that it is a security feature for shared links but you can add a table below it with all data from the board so it doesn’t really make sense that its not an option.

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

We’re super excited to share our new app with the world, Map View Pro.

It allows you to choose what information is displayed when you click a pin and customize the color of the pins on the map (fe.: color them based on who’s assigned to an item).

Read more on our docs on what colums we support as source for the Pin Color and what columns we support for the Info Window.

You can try it for free for 14 days here, if you’re missing anything, do let us know!

Best,

Maarten
